name: LinkedIn
description: Publish posts, articles, and media to LinkedIn
setupHint: Requires a LinkedIn App with 'Share on LinkedIn' product.

setupGuide.title: Create a LinkedIn Company Page
setupGuide.description: You need a Company Page to register an app. Create one if you don't have one.

setupGuide.title: Create a LinkedIn App
setupGuide.description: Go to LinkedIn Developers and create a new app. Link it to your Company Page.

setupGuide.title: Add required products
setupGuide.description: In your app's Products tab, add 'Share on LinkedIn' and 'Sign In with LinkedIn using OpenID Connect'. This gives your app permission to post.

setupGuide.title: Verify your app
setupGuide.description: Go to Settings > Company verification. Open the verification URL as a Page Admin and approve it.

setupGuide.title: Add the redirect URI
setupGuide.description: In the Auth tab, add your gateway callback URL as an authorized redirect URI: http://localhost:7400/auth/oauth/linkedin/callback

setupGuide.title: Enter your credentials below
setupGuide.description: Copy the Client ID and Client Secret from the Auth tab and paste them below.
